'''鈭歞-w-ng-j''' ('''kadawngejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jampack|jampack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jampack|jampack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-w-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadawngejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidawngejoko|thidawngejoko]] || [[word:jidawngejoko|jidawngejoko]] || [[word:shidawngejoko|shidawngejoko]] || [[word:kidawngejoko|kidawngejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudawngejoko|thuthudawngejoko]] || [[word:jujudawngejoko|jujudawngejoko]] || [[word:shushudawngejoko|shushudawngejoko]] || [[word:kukudawngejoko|kukudawngejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudawngejoko|thudawngejoko]] || [[word:judawngejoko|judawngejoko]] || [[word:shudawngejoko|shudawngejoko]] || [[word:kudawngejoko|kudawngejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodawngejoko|thodawngejoko]] || [[word:jodawngejoko|jodawngejoko]] || [[word:shodawngejoko|shodawngejoko]] || [[word:kodawngejoko|kodawngejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dawngejoko|th忙dawngejoko]] || [[word:j忙dawngejoko|j忙dawngejoko]] || [[word:sh忙dawngejoko|sh忙dawngejoko]] || [[word:k忙dawngejoko|k忙dawngejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadawngejoko|thadawngejoko]] || [[word:jadawngejoko|jadawngejoko]] || [[word:shadawngejoko|shadawngejoko]] || [[word:kadawngejoko|kadawngejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadawngejoko|thadawngejoko]] || [[word:jadawngejoko|jadawngejoko]] || [[word:shadawngejoko|shadawngejoko]] || [[word:kadawngejoko|kadawngejoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
